Feishu upload path resolution could read files outside the configured localRoots sandbox before handing them to the upload path.

## Impact

A tool caller constrained to workspace or localRoots paths could exfiltrate arbitrary host files through Feishu upload actions.

## Affected Component

`extensions/feishu/src/docx.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `>= 2026.2.6, <= 2026.3.24`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.28`
- Latest stable `2026.3.28` contains the fix.

## Fix

Fixed by commit `764394c78b` (`fix: enforce localRoots sandbox on Feishu docx upload file reads`).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00339, "percentile": 0.25602}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-31T23:53:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41363"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-31T23:53:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/764394c78b6c22c5b53c3cd132d27ff36340bf45", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41363", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-arbitrary-file-read-via-feishu-upload-image-parameter", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Feishu extension resolveUploadInput bypasses file-system sandbox and allows arbitrary file reads via upload_image", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T15:36:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.2.6, <= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenClaw: Feishu extension resolveUploadInput bypasses file-system sandbox and allows arbitrary file reads via upload_image
